name: Daily Habit Tracker
description: Track up to 10 daily habits with streaks, completion rings, and a GitHub-style heatmap calendar. Use localStorage to persist data.

name: Quick Expense Logger
description: Log expenses by category with emoji icons. Show today's total vs a daily budget with a progress bar. Pie chart of categories. localStorage persistence.

name: Pomodoro Timer
description: 25/5 Pomodoro timer with sound alerts using Web Audio API. Show session count, break reminders, and a circular progress ring animation.

name: Daily Journal
description: Minimalist daily journal with mood tagging (emoji), word count stats, and a calendar view of past entries. localStorage persistence.

name: Water Intake Tracker
description: Tap water glass icons to log intake. Show a progress ring toward daily goal (8 glasses). Include daily history bar chart. Animated wave fill effect.

name: Link Saver
description: Save URLs with custom tags. Auto-extract page title using Open Graph meta via a CORS proxy. Filter by tag. Copy link button. localStorage persistence.

name: Word of the Day
description: Fetch a new word daily from the Free Dictionary API. Show definition, phonetics, examples, and synonyms. Save favorites list. Share as image card.

name: Grocery List Maker
description: Add grocery items with quantity. Auto-group by category (produce, dairy, bakery etc). Check off items while shopping. Share list as text. localStorage.

name: Sleep Log
description: Log bedtime and wake time. Calculate sleep duration and quality score. Show weekly bar chart and monthly average. Streak for consistent sleep time.

name: Currency Converter
description: Live exchange rates from the free ExchangeRate-API. Favourite currency pairs. Offline fallback with last-fetched rates. Conversion history.

name: Flashcard Quiz App
description: Create custom flashcard decks. Flip animation on click. Spaced repetition scoring (easy/hard). Deck progress bar. Import/export decks as JSON.

name: Net Worth Tracker
description: Add assets and liabilities by category. Track monthly snapshots. Show net worth trend line chart. Pie chart of asset vs liability breakdown.

name: Meal Planner
description: Plan breakfast, lunch, dinner for 7 days. Auto-generate a consolidated grocery list from the plan. Calorie estimator per day. localStorage persistence.

name: Focus Music Player
description: Embed YouTube lofi/nature playlists by category. Show a session timer that auto-pauses music when complete. Visualizer bars animation using CSS.

name: AI Email Rephraser
description: Paste a draft email. Choose tone: Formal, Friendly, Concise, Assertive. Call Claude API to rewrite it. Show before/after diff. Copy button.

name: Daily Quote Card
description: Fetch a random quote from the Quotable API. Render as a beautiful shareable card with gradient background. Download as PNG using html2canvas.

name: BMI & Fitness Calc
description: Calculate BMI, TDEE, and macro split (protein/carbs/fat). Support metric and imperial units. Show BMI category, recommended range, and goal macros.

name: Bill Splitter
description: Add people and items to a bill. Assign items to people. Auto-calculate who owes whom with smart debt simplification. WhatsApp share summary.

name: AI Meeting Summariser
description: Paste raw meeting notes or transcript. Claude API returns structured summary: decisions, action items with owners, open questions, next steps.

name: Minimalist To-Do
description: One main focus task at top. Sub-tasks below. Auto-archive completed tasks at midnight. Drag to reorder. Confetti animation on completing main task.

name: Password Strength Meter
description: Visual entropy score with crack-time estimate. Check against common passwords list. Suggestions panel. Generate strong password button. No data sent anywhere.

name: Plant Watering Log
description: Add plants with name, emoji, and watering interval in days. Track last watered date. Show overdue/due-today alerts. Streak for consistent care.

name: Reading Tracker
description: Log books with title, author, total pages, and current page. Track reading sessions. Show pages/day stats, reading speed, and yearly goal ring.

name: Invoice Generator
description: Fill in client details, your details, and line items with quantity and rate. Auto-calculate totals and tax. Export as a clean PDF using jsPDF.

name: AI Recipe Suggester
description: Enter ingredients you have. Claude API returns 3 recipe ideas with ingredients needed, steps, estimated cook time, and calories. Save favorites.

name: Breath & Meditation
description: Guided breathing patterns: 4-7-8, Box Breathing, Wim Hof. Animated circle expands/contracts. Session log with duration. Streak tracker.

name: Keyboard Shortcut Quiz
description: Quiz mode for VS Code, Mac, Figma, and Chrome shortcuts. Show the action, type the shortcut. Score tracking. Spaced repetition for wrong answers.

name: AI Cover Letter Writer
description: Paste job description and your resume/skills. Claude API drafts a personalised cover letter. Edit inline. Export as PDF or copy to clipboard.

name: Net Salary Calculator
description: Enter CTC. Calculate take-home salary after tax, PF, and deductions. Support India (new + old regime), US (federal + state), and UK tax rules.

name: Personal Dashboard
description: Combines habit tracker, expense summary, today's tasks, and live weather (Open-Meteo API) in a single beautiful dashboard. Dark/light mode toggle.
